ddls:
CREATE TABLE "films" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the film was released */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the film */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the film was released in theaters */,
  "box_office" REAL /* Box office revenue of the film */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the film */,
  "production_status" TEXT /* Current production status (e.g., pre-production, production, post-production, released) */,
  "distributor" TEXT /* Distributor of the film */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the film */,
  "runtime" TEXT /* Runtime of the film */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the film (e.g., G, PG, PG-13, R) */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Awards won by the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_crew" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film the crew member worked on */,
  "crew_name" TEXT /* Name of the crew member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the crew member (e.g., Director, Producer, Writer, Cinematographer) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the crew member started working on the film */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the crew member finished working on the film */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the crew member belongs to (e.g., Production, Camera, Lighting, Sound) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crew member */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film the director worked on */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the director (e.g., Director, Co-Director) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the director started working on the film */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the director finished working on the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_directors_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_directors_crew_id FOREIGN KEY ("crew_id") REFERENCES film_crew ("crew_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "executive_producers" (
  "ep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each executive producer */,
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crew member */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film the executive producer worked on */,
  "ep_name" TEXT /* Name of the executive producer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the executive producer */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the executive producer started working on the film */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the executive producer finished working on the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_executive_producers_crew_id FOREIGN KEY ("crew_id") REFERENCES film_crew ("crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_executive_producers_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "writers" (
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each writer */,
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crew member */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film the writer worked on */,
  "writer_name" TEXT /* Name of the writer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the writer (e.g., Writer, Screenplay) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the writer started working on the film */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the writer finished working on the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("writer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_writers_crew_id FOREIGN KEY ("crew_id") REFERENCES film_crew ("crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_writers_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voice_actors" (
  "voice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voice actor */,
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crew member */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film the voice actor worked on */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the voice actor */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character voiced */,
  "voice_role" TEXT /* Role of the voice actor (e.g., Main Character, Supporting Character) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the voice actor started working on the film */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the voice actor finished working on the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voice_actors_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voice_actors_crew_id FOREIGN KEY ("crew_id") REFERENCES film_crew ("crew_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "other_contributors" (
  "contrib_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each other contributor */,
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crew member */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film the contributor worked on */,
  "contrib_name" TEXT /* Name of the contributor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the contributor (e.g., Story Artist, Character Designer) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the contributor started working on the film */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the contributor finished working on the film */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the contributor's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contrib_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_other_contributors_crew_id FOREIGN KEY ("crew_id") REFERENCES film_crew ("crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_other_contributors_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film the note is associated with */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of the note (e.g., Production Note, Marketing Note) */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who created the note */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_notes_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Producer, Director, Writer, Admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., Production, Marketing, Administration) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the film data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the film data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film the version is associated with */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number (e.g., v1.0, v2.0) */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_versions_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_restrictions" (
  "restriction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restriction */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film the restriction is associated with */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the film (e.g., G, PG, PG-13, R) */,
  "restriction_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the restriction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restriction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_restrictions_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film the genre is associated with */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_genres_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film the award is associated with */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_awards_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)
